name: Rexnord Corp. Registered Shs DL
summary: Rexnord Corporation is a multi-platform industrial leader with two strategic platforms: Process & Motion Control and Water Management. Headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, the company designs, manufactures, markets and services specified, highly engineered products and systems used to increase productivity and provide vital services. Rexnord focuses on delivering solutions to customers in a wide array of end markets.
